title: Schema + migration + changeset trio for Product with money precision
prompt: Build the full three-file trio for MyApp.Catalog.Product: schema at lib/my_app/catalog/product.ex (fields: name, sku, price, cost), migration at priv/repo/migrations/20260411700000_create_products.exs, and ensure the migration declares price and cost as :decimal with precision 12 and scale 2. Changeset validates all required, price > 0, sku unique_constraint. Include matching unique_index in the migration. Use UTC timestamps throughout.
tier_rationale: Two-file coordination where schema and migration must align on types, precision, and the unique_index-unique_constraint pair. Sonnet typically gets one file right but misses either the migration precision or the unique_index match.
research_citation: Ecto.Schema docs on :decimal precision + Arrowsmith Labs on unique_constraint matching.
